summary: Completed frontend testing of Phase 2 Membership System. All features working correctly: MembershipPage loads with pricing (₹99/month, ₹999/year), 12 pillars displayed, Sign In button opens auth modal, protected routes (/dine, /stay, /travel, /care) redirect to /membership when not logged in, /celebrate remains public, and authenticated users can access protected routes.
critical_code_review_comments: MembershipPage.jsx correctly implements full-page design without navbar (similar to ServiceDeskPage)
ProtectedRoute.jsx correctly redirects unauthenticated users to /membership with state preservation for intended destination
App.js correctly wraps service pillars (dine, stay, travel, care, enjoy, fit, advisory, paperwork, emergency) with ProtectedRoute
Celebrate routes remain public as expected - no ProtectedRoute wrapper
Auth modal in MembershipPage works correctly with email/password login and registration toggle
context_for_next_testing_agent: Membership System Phase 2 complete. MembershipPage at /membership is a full-page landing with pricing plans. ProtectedRoute component gates service pillars. Test user membership_test@example.com / Test123! available for authenticated testing.

membership_page_loads.pricing_annual: PASS - ₹999/year visible with BEST VALUE badge

protected_routes_redirect./travel: PASS - Redirects to /membership when not logged in
protected_routes_redirect./care: PASS - Redirects to /membership when not logged in

verification_summary.auth_modal: VERIFIED - Opens on Sign In click, has email/password fields, toggle to signup
verification_summary.authenticated_flow: VERIFIED - Login works, redirects to /my-pets, can access protected routes
